title: Smallest Range II
hints: Sort A first. The relative order of elements helps determine which get +K or -K to minimize the range.
Consider splitting the sorted array into two parts. Add K to the smaller half and subtract K from the larger half.
The new min is likely min(A[0]+K, A[n-1]-K) and new max is max(A[i]+K, A[i+1]-K). Minimize this difference over all split points i.
